_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater on every miner startup. To add a new platform: add an entry under `platforms`. To force-upgrade across a fork boundary: set `min_required_sha256` on the relevant platform entry. v1 single-binary schema (top-level sha256+url) is still recognized by the updater as legacy (treated as x86_64-linux); the v2 platforms-dict schema below is preferred and supports any platform key the wrapper can detect.
notes: v0.4.11 - aarch64-linux + aarch64-linux-cuda12 now point at btx-prebuilds-v0.32.5 (Grace/Graviton/GB10/Spark rigs get the same PR58+C4 throughput win the x86_64 fleet got at v0.4.7). Built via the build-solver-aarch64.yml workflow on GitHub's ubuntu-24.04-arm runner from btxchain/btx v0.32.5 with patches 05+10+11. arm64-darwin entry still on v0.32.2 pending Apple Silicon rebuild. No code changes from v0.4.10; manifest-only update.

x86_64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.5 + PR58 GPU saturation kernels (byte-exact factored math, ~5.4x Pascal/~3x 5090) + C4 continuous-feed RunOneJob. CUDA 12.8, archs sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120. LTO enabled. Built on home-1070, KAT-verified bit-equivalent (12/12 shares) vs internal ship-base 147e59f7.

aarch64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.5 + PR58 GPU saturation kernels + C4 continuous-feed RunOneJob. CUDA 13.0, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120;sm_121. Covers GB10/Spark + RTX Blackwell consumer. Requires CUDA 13.0+ runtime. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml on GitHub ubuntu-24.04-arm. KAT-equivalent to x86_64 build by construction (same source + same patches); not GPU-tested on aarch64 host because GitHub runners have no GPU.

aarch64-linux-cuda12.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda12. BTX v0.32.5 + PR58 + C4. CUDA 12.8 build, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (no sm_121 — use cuda13 build for GB10). Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml on GitHub ubuntu-24.04-arm.

arm64-darwin.notes: Apple Silicon Metal backend. CI verifies cpu_digest == metal_digest == reference_digest before publish.
